yuna.face: oval face, soft gentle features, natural light makeup, warm brown eyes, slight dimples when smiling
yuna.hair: long black hair with subtle chestnut highlights, slightly wavy, often worn down or in a loose ponytail
yuna.body: slender figure, fair porcelain skin, graceful posture
yuna.personality_note: おっとり天然・照れ屋 — 表情は柔らかく恥じらいのある自然な笑顔を基本とする
yuna.default_outfit: fitted grey pencil skirt above the knee, white silk blouse, black thigh-high stockings

soojin.face: heart-shaped face, sharp defined jawline, minimal dewy makeup, elegant monolid eyes with subtle eyeliner
soojin.hair: straight dark brown hair, shoulder length, center part, silky smooth texture
soojin.body: slim toned figure, porcelain white skin, long legs
soojin.personality_note: クール計算高い・たまに見せる天然ギャップ — 表情はクールな横顔やふとした瞬間の素の笑顔
soojin.default_outfit: pleated mini skirt, oversized knit sweater falling off one shoulder, ankle boots

mei.face: round soft face, delicate features, light natural makeup with rosy cheeks, large expressive dark eyes
mei.hair: long straight jet-black hair reaching mid-back, often with a side braid or hair clip
mei.body: petite figure, smooth warm-toned skin, delicate frame
mei.personality_note: 知的好奇心旺盛・本の虫 — 表情は集中した横顔や本を読みながらの無防備な姿
mei.default_outfit: floral cheongsam-inspired dress, white cotton blouse, pleated skirt, mary jane shoes

riko.face: mature elegant features, defined cheekbones, natural no-makeup look, calm confident brown eyes
riko.hair: medium-length dark brown hair, usually tied in a low bun or loose waves when off-duty
riko.body: well-proportioned figure, healthy glowing skin, confident posture
riko.personality_note: 世話焼き姉御・頼れるお姉さん — 表情は穏やかな微笑みや疲れた後のリラックス顔
riko.default_outfit: white nurse uniform with fitted waist, white stockings, comfortable shoes

chiralism_modifiers.zettai_ryouiki: thigh-high stockings with a clearly visible gap of bare skin between the stocking top and the skirt hem, the absolute territory zone highlighted by natural lighting
chiralism_modifiers.off_shoulder: loose oversized sweater or knit top naturally slipping off one shoulder, revealing smooth collarbone and shoulder line, casual and unintentional
chiralism_modifiers.yukata_gap: traditional yukata with the collar naturally falling slightly open near the nape, showing a glimpse of the elegant neck line and upper back, traditional and graceful
chiralism_modifiers.wind_skirt: a light breeze catching the hem of a pleated skirt, the fabric lifting and flowing naturally with the wind, capturing the moment of movement
chiralism_modifiers.back_line: backless dress or top revealing the smooth curve of shoulder blades and upper back, elegant spine line visible
chiralism_modifiers.sitting_cross: sitting with legs crossed on a chair or bench, skirt naturally riding up slightly on the thigh, relaxed casual posture
chiralism_modifiers.thigh_squish: sitting, thighs slightly compressed against the surface, soft thigh skin slightly squished, tight skirt or shorts emphasizing the thigh fleshiness, natural body physics
chiralism_modifiers.shoulder_slip: clothing shoulder strap naturally slipping down to reveal a smooth bare shoulder, unbothered expression, unintentional casual seduction
chiralism_modifiers.hair_tie: hands reaching behind head tying hair up, mouth occasionally holding a hair tie, revealing nape and underarm areas, natural casual gesture
chiralism_modifiers.cleavage_top: shot from a high angle looking slightly down, revealing subtle natural cleavage through loose clothing collar or button-down shirt, flattering perspective
chiralism_modifiers.panty_flash: accidental glimpse of underwear under a short skirt while moving or bending, unintended brief exposure, candid vulnerable moment, wind blowing or awkward posture
chiralism_modifiers.leaning_cleavage: leaning forward over a table or object, loose top falling slightly open to reveal deep cleavage, unaware expression, accidental exposure from a low neckline
chiralism_modifiers.bra_sheer: wearing a thin white shirt or blouse under bright sunlight, the faint contour and color of a lace bra slightly visible through the translucent fabric, natural everyday sheer
chiralism_modifiers.vpl: wearing tight pants, sweatpants or tight skirt, the subtle outline of panty line (VPL) faintly visible on the rear contour, realistic physical texture, shot from behind or side-back
chiralism_modifiers.button_gap: wearing a slightly tight button-down shirt or cardigan, a small natural gap opening between the buttons around the chest area when viewed from the side, revealing a tiny glimpse of bare skin or inner wear
chiralism_modifiers.relaxed_leg_gap: sitting completely relaxed at home with legs crossed or hugging knees (gymnast seating), short pants riding up, offering a subtle glimpse of inner thigh and the dark crotch area shadow, totally unguarded
chiralism_modifiers.bending_over_back: bending forward at the waist to pick something up from the floor without bending knees, tight skirt riding up, emphasizing hips and rear contour, shot from slightly lower back angle
chiralism_modifiers.mid_undress: caught in the middle of taking off a top, arms stuck in the shirt raised above the head, torso and lower stomach completely exposed, ruffled hair, vulnerable and defenseless posture

fetish_modifiers.wet_sheer: clothing slightly dampened by rain or water splash, fabric clinging to skin and becoming subtly translucent, water droplets visible on skin and fabric surface, glistening wet texture
fetish_modifiers.dewy_skin: skin glistening with a thin sheen of perspiration, naturally dewy and luminous, tiny beads of sweat catching the light, healthy post-exercise glow
fetish_modifiers.neck_sweat: delicate beads of sweat trailing down the nape of the neck and collarbone area, skin gleaming in warm lighting, hair slightly sticking to the damp neck
fetish_modifiers.towel_wrap: wrapped in a large fluffy white bath towel after bathing, bare shoulders and collarbone visible above towel edge, damp skin with water droplets, hair slightly wet
fetish_modifiers.wet_hair: hair dampened by sudden rain, wet strands clinging to face and neck, water droplets on skin, natural and candid rain-caught moment
fetish_modifiers.morning_stretch: stretching arms upward in thin sleepwear just after waking up, fabric riding up naturally, sleepy relaxed expression, soft morning light
fetish_modifiers.steam_bath: in a steamy bathroom environment, skin dewy from steam and warmth, towel wrapped around body, condensation on nearby surfaces, dreamy soft-focus atmosphere
fetish_modifiers.armpits: raising arms slightly, revealing clean smooth underarms, wearing sleeveless top or camisole, natural relaxing body language
fetish_modifiers.collarbone: wide or low neckline emphasizing elegant collarbones and delicate upper chest area, soft shadows highlighting bone structure
fetish_modifiers.see_through: wearing sheer translucent fabric over beautiful curves, subtle lace or mesh details, light passing gently through clothing
fetish_modifiers.glasses_slip: wearing stylish glasses slightly slipping down the bridge of nose, looking over the rims with a soft gaze, intellectual but relaxed
fetish_modifiers.pantyhose_feet: standing in high heels or barefoot wearing sheer pantyhose, tight skirt, office lady aesthetics emphasizing nylon texture
fetish_modifiers.rib_knit_bust: wearing a very tight ribbed knit sweater, the fabric stretching around the bust, heavily emphasizing the natural curve and volume of the chest, no skin exposure but extremely sensual shape
fetish_modifiers.adjusting_strap: hand reaching under the clothes neckline or collar to casually adjust a slipping bra strap, an intimate and very private everyday gesture, unaware expression
fetish_modifiers.hands_between_thighs: sitting down while sandwiching both hands casually between bare inner thighs for warmth, conveying soft flesh texture and body temperature, cozy and intimate posture
fetish_modifiers.touching_lips: lightly sweeping a stray hair from wet lips with a finger, or wiping the corner of the mouth, bringing intense visual focus to the soft lips and delicate finger gesture, captivating gaze

camera_presets.low_angle: shot from slightly below eye level looking up, 35mm wide-angle lens, natural perspective distortion, emphasizing legs and figure
camera_presets.eye_level: eye-level portrait composition, 85mm prime lens, f/1.8 aperture, beautiful shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh
camera_presets.from_behind: shot from behind at a natural three-quarter angle, 50mm standard lens, capturing the back and profile, environmental context visible
camera_presets.close_up: intimate close-up portrait, 85mm lens, f/1.4 wide aperture, extreme bokeh background, focus on face and upper body details
camera_presets.full_body: full body environmental portrait, 35mm lens, f/2.8, showing the complete figure within the scene context, natural framing

mood_presets.casual_daily: soft natural daylight streaming through a window, warm indoor atmosphere, cozy lived-in environment, natural color temperature
mood_presets.golden_hour: warm golden hour sunlight with long shadows, rich orange and amber tones, outdoor setting, natural lens flare, romantic atmosphere
mood_presets.rainy_day: overcast diffused light through rain-spotted windows, moody cool tones, wet reflective surfaces, atmospheric rain falling, melancholic beauty
mood_presets.night_city: colorful neon city lights creating vibrant bokeh in background, nighttime urban setting, dramatic artificial lighting mixing warm and cool tones
mood_presets.summer_heat: intense bright summer sunlight, heat haze visible, high contrast shadows, vivid colors, blue sky, cicada-summer atmosphere
mood_presets.summer_festival: warm paper lantern lighting at a Japanese summer festival, evening twilight glow, festive atmosphere, red and gold warm tones
mood_presets.morning_light: soft early morning light through sheer curtains, gentle warm glow, peaceful quiet atmosphere, bedroom or living room setting

negative_base: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), (blurry, out of focus:1.2), cartoon, anime, 3d render, cgi, illustration, painting, drawing, sketch, plastic skin, artificial skin, doll-like, mannequin, bad anatomy, deformed, mutated, extra limbs, missing limbs, fused fingers, too many fingers, disfigured, watermark, text, signature, logo, username, airbrushed, overly smooth skin, uncanny valley, cross-eyed, bad proportions
negative_sfw_addition: nude, naked, explicit, nsfw, pornographic, sexual content, nipple, genitalia, underwear clearly visible, fully transparent clothing, lingerie as main outfit
negative_fetish_limits: fully nude, explicit sexual pose, pornographic, genitalia visible, nipple fully exposed
